MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Daniel Stern for Plaintiff HO Properties, INCis present. Represented by Brenda Obra
Defendant Randall Riccardo, is present.
Attorney, Eric Lifschitz, representing the defendant through limited scope.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-07-2009 is vacated.
